page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: USLT420, USLT498A or AMST498G.

Formerly: USLT498A.

USLT430 Globalization and the Diversifying U.S. (3 Credits)

While often talked about as a recent phenomenon and one focused

on capital, the ebbs and flows of globalization has a long history

among Latina/o communities in the United States. The impact and consequences of globalization can be seen in US foreign policy in
